summary: Excellent performance highlighted by a superb Dark Star and strong setlist, with an apparently clean recording.
review: The reviewer rates this show five stars, calling it one of the best from ’78‑’95 and praising Dark Star, Feel Like a Stranger, Tennessee Jed, The Music Never Stopped and the Watchtower>Fantasy sequence. No specific recording complaints are noted, suggesting the FLAC source is at least listenable, while Jerry’s guitar tone on his Rosebud is highlighted as “deliciously sweet”.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewer gives a perfect score for the musical performance, and although recording details are scarce, no issues are mentioned, implying good quality; combined weight yields a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard vs. audience; reviewer focuses on performance, indicating the FLAC source is acceptable with no noticeable flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall show described as outstanding and tightly energetic, with high intensity throughout and seamless transitions into the drum segment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for an exceptionally sweet tone on his Rosebud guitar, sounding richer than his previous Tiger and incorporating midi effects.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mention of a smooth “sweet trail‑off into Drums” after Dark Star.
